Privacy

Last updated: July 23, 2026

At Web of Origins, we respect your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle any information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

We do not collect, store, or process any personal information directly.

• You do not need to create an account, sign up, or provide any personal details to use the site.
• No names, email addresses, IP addresses, or other personally identifiable information (PII) are collected or stored by Web of Origins itself.

Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services, which may collect limited data:

Google Analytics
We use Google Analytics to understand visitor trends (e.g., number of visitors, popular pages, and general usage patterns). Google may collect anonymous data such as:
• Pages visited
• Time spent on the site
• Browser and device type
• General geographic location (country level)

Cloudflare
We use Cloudflare for CDN, security, and performance. Cloudflare may collect technical data including:
• IP address (for security and abuse prevention)
• Browser information
• Request data for DDoS protection and caching

These services operate under their own privacy policies:
Google Analytics Privacy Policy
Cloudflare Privacy Policy

Cookies

The site uses minimal cookies, primarily those set by Google Analytics and Cloudflare for functionality and analytics. You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling them may affect site performance and features.

How We Use the Information

We use the anonymized analytics data solely to:
• Improve website performance and user experience
• Understand which content is most useful
• Make informed decisions about future updates

We do not use this data for advertising, profiling, or selling to third parties.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share any personal data with third parties. Any data shared with Google Analytics or Cloudflare is governed by their respective privacy policies.

Data Security

Although we do not collect personal data, we take reasonable technical and organizational measures (via Cloudflare) to protect the website from unauthorized access and attacks.

Your Rights

Since we do not collect personal information, there is no personal data for us to provide, correct, or delete. For data held by Google or Cloudflare, please refer to their privacy tools and policies.

Children’s Privacy

Our site is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect data from children.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at: weboforigins@gmail.com
